{{Infobox group
| name = Mason
| introduced = Of Shadow and Sea
}}

''See also: [[Mason Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Masons]] are a respected order within the [[Consultants]], functioning as specialists in undercover infiltration. Their primary role is to act as insiders who gather intelligence for the [[Consultant's Guild]] by embedding themselves into various professional fields. To achieve this, they undergo lifelong training starting in childhood. The order hosts a large number of students—over two hundred—who learn diverse trades such as [[alchemy]], scholarship, merchantry, and shipwrighting to ensure they are perfectly positioned to relay information when needed. While the [[Masons]] provide the foundation for the [[Consultants]]' operations, they are distinct from other groups like the [[Architects]], who design plans, or the [[Gardeners]], who handle removals. [[Masons]] rely heavily on disguises to maintain their cover, though they are noted for being less suited for traditional stealth work. Their training is rigorous and often involves remaining inconspicuous even while performing significant tasks. The order operates out of the [[House of the Masons]] and is led by a [[High Mason]], a position held by [[Yala]]. The organization views itself as a family rather than a military force, though they follow strict guild laws regarding their missions and targets.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|As members of a [[Guild]], [[Masons]] utilize various uniforms and disguises to perform their specialized work. This group includes trainees, servants, and individuals who wear aprons, as well as a team composed of twelve sailor [[Masons]] and fourteen combat-trained [[Masons]]. Working for the [[Greenwardens]], one Mason was responsible for training [[Kameira]] and assisted by hauling [[Shera]] onto the back of a Waverider-mounted companion. In addition to cleaning up after battles alongside [[Shepherds]], [[Masons]] have also operated undercover within the [[Navigator’s Guild]].}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">12</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Masons]] rely on disguises for their work.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c1">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Masons]] are part of the group that cleans up after battles alongside [[Shepherds]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c4">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|A [[Mason]] is a character who works for the [[Greenwardens]] and was training [[Kameira]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Masons]] can go undercover in various uniforms.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c6">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Masons]] are members of a [[Guild]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|A [[Mason]] mounted a Waverider.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c8">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|A [[Mason]] hauled [[Shera]] onto the back of a [[Kameira]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|A [[Mason]] was undercover in the [[Navigator’s Guild]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c10">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The team includes fourteen combat-trained [[Masons]] and twelve sailor [[Masons]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Masons]] are a group that includes trainees.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c13">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|There are [[Mason]] servants.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c26">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|A [[Mason]] wore an apron.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c26" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Masons]] are a group that includes guards.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c19">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Masons]] are a group of people armed with guns.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c21">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Of Killers and Kings ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|A Palace maid, who is a [[Mason]], left a ladder down for [[Shera]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c14">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Mason]] led the way through the hallway.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|A stranger was identified as a [[Mason]] by his lack of a black uniform.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c15">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|A [[Mason]] attempted to attack [[Shera]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c15" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|“The full team,” Meia explained, “consists of thirty-three Shepherds, fourteen combat-trained Masons, a dozen sailor Masons to crew the ship, and us.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c10" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire groups]]
